hooks.command: python -c 'import sys,json,re;d=json.load(sys.stdin);p=(d.get("tool_input") or {}).get("file_path","").replace(chr(92),"/");m=re.search(r"src/components/.+[.](tsx|css)$",p) and not p.endswith(".stories.tsx");print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Component file written: "+p+" - before declaring this component done, run the pixel-parity-verify skill (Figma PNG export vs same-scale screenshot + computed-style assertions)."}}) if m else "")' 2>/dev/null || true
